content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pubs.rsc.org/en/content/articlehtml/2019/cs/c9cs00159j", "source_title": "Electrochemical nitrogen fixation and utilization: theories, advanced catalyst materials and system design", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Electrochemical nitrogen fixation and utilization: theories, advanced catalyst materials and system design\nNitrogen is a fundamental constit...", "direct_quote": "Electrochemical nitrogen fixation and utilization: theories, advanced catalyst materials and system design\nNitrogen is a fundamental constituent for all living creatures on the Earth and modern industrial society.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The current nitrogen industry is largely powered by fossil fuels with huge energy consumption and carbon dioxide emission, and nitrogen poll...", "direct_quote": "The current nitrogen industry is largely powered by fossil fuels with huge energy consumption and carbon dioxide emission, and nitrogen pollution in surface water bodies induced by the indiscriminate discharge of industrial and domestic wastewater ha", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts."}]}
